title: Shield Training
effect: If you use a shield, Speed defense tasks are eased by two steps instead of one. Enabler. Ship Footing (3 Speed points): For ten minutes, all tasks you attempt while on a spaceship are eased. Action to initiate.
details: If you use a shield, Speed defense tasks are eased by two steps instead of one. Enabler.
Ship Footing (3 Speed points): For ten minutes, all tasks you attempt while on a spaceship are eased. Action to initiate.
